docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON GREGORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAMELA REEVES $1,052.69 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,060.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,311.02 FILED BY JOHNSON GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT PAMELA REEVES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
POS ON DEF.INVALID.SERVED OUT OF STATE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-24-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-12-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
NOTICE OF DEST. OF EXHIBITS TO DEFENDANT RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PAMELA REEVES HEARING SET FOR OCT-11-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
COURT ORDERED TRANSFER TO SUPERIOR COURT
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-11-1991, GRANTED
